title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #2, Green Bull, Unknown person #3, Kaido as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 3 Issues in a row!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Can you believe it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Can you believe it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Another in the series of specials by ODA that show the origins of UTA's songs. This time it's the lyrics to 'the world's continuation.'

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I sing that song it's a prayer that you come...and I need you to hear if Need you to believe it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's have faith in our trust facebook on as long as I'm: Till again we meet... Outside & dream.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: The Flower Capital - After the festivities

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hang in there, Raiza!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're so thin now...

dialogue.speaker: Green Bull
dialogue.text: - The aftermath of ryokugyu's assault....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't die, Shinobu- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What terrifying sorcery!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may find it hard to admit, but that man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...had a point.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kaido's presence did keep other threats at Bay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He was a tremendous deterrent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive me! I should not have been in Kuri when all this happened!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I was completely oblivious!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't sweat it. We were able to avoid more casualties thanks to mononsuke-sama's bravery. PRRRRRR.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How is OTSURU-SAN anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well... Okobore town itself was reduced to ashes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And Tsuru suffered a nasty burn to the face, but I am just thankful that she managed to survive.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, if it isn't Otsuru-san. I hear kin-san finally came home?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, but he had to return to the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You hail from the capital yourself, any plans to move back?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I always want to be by his side.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But wow! even after 20 years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: TSURU is as gorgeous as ever!()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Enough already, even puppy love isn't this sappy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Mrow- Row-row- Row!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hehehe!!o I think it's wonderful, kin-san!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UGGH... I WISH I WERE POPULAR...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You-Gara just focus on your recovery, Raiza!!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
